topics.title: Host and Guest Discuss Hygiene and Travel
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding personal hygiene, the logistics of traveling through airports with luxury amenities, and a humorous exchange about an upcoming film script.

topics.title: Ocean's Eleven Script and Casting
topics.summary: The studio discusses a proposed film script based on Ocean's Eleven, debating the inclusion of professional wrestlers in the cast and the quality of the potential production.

topics.title: A-Rod Contract Negotiations and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of A-Rod's return to the Yankees, the nuances of media questioning regarding a crime victim, and the difficulties of communicating about sexual satisfaction in a relationship.

topics.title: Joe Francis Legal Battles and Florida Incarceration
topics.summary: The studio details the legal complications and allegations of misconduct involving Joe Francis during his detention in Florida and subsequent transfer to Nevada.

topics.title: Joe Francis Legal Battle
topics.summary: The studio discusses Joe Francis's legal situation in Florida, his claims of being held without trial, and the complexities of his civil case regarding tax issues.

topics.title: Caller Confrontation Over Radio Access
topics.summary: The studio addresses a caller's grievances regarding the screening process for phone calls and his perceived lack of airtime.

topics.title: Double A's Show Participation and Alleged Tapes
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange with a long-time caller, Double A, regarding his desire for more airtime, his lack of original content, and the authenticity of a phone sex tape he claimed to possess.

topics.title: Radio Career Advice and Phone Sex Tapes
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange regarding a caller's aspirations for a radio career and the subsequent debate over whether to air a recording of an alleged phone sex call.

topics.title: Caller Confrontation and Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange with a caller regarding a recording of phone sex before transitioning into a gossip game segment featuring stories about celebrities like Victoria Beckham, Justin Timberlake, Drew Barrymore, and Jennifer Aniston.

topics.title: Radio News and Studio Banter
topics.summary: The studio covers news segments regarding Artie Lange’s USO tour, a legal dispute involving Bigfoot, and sports-related controversies before transitioning into discussions about avant-garde music and internal staff dynamics.

topics.title: Scott's Comedy Debut and Lost Cash Story
topics.summary: The studio explores Scott's upcoming comedy performance in Cleveland, his interactions with Benji regarding past favors, and a story about losing five hundred dollars on top of his car.

topics.title: Prank Calls and News Segment Wrap-up
topics.summary: The studio reviews a prank call involving an Italian accent, discusses news stories including a judge's job loss and a tragic discovery in Staten Island, and covers upcoming entertainment news.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the Hollywood writers' strike, upcoming awards shows, celebrity news regarding Matt Damon and O.J. Simpson, and local sports commentary.
